lists.title: Packing Lists
lists.subtitle: Gear lists for your hikes
lists.empty: You don't have any lists yet. Create your first packing list.
lists.base_weight_hint: Gear inside your backpack — tent, sleeping bag, pad, stove, cookware
lists.worn_weight_hint: Clothes and footwear you wear — jacket, boots, headwear, headlamp
lists.consumable_weight_hint: Gear that gets used up on the trail — fuel, batteries, sunscreen. Plan food in the Meals tab
lists.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this list? All items will be deleted too.
lists.name: Name
lists.no_items: List is empty. Add gear from your library.
lists.no_gear_hint: You don't have any gear yet. Add items to your library first.
lists.all_added: All gear already added to the list

meals.subtitle: Meal planning for your hikes

meals.name: Name
meals.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this meal plan? All days and entries will also be deleted.
meals.no_entries: No entries yet. Add your first dish.
meals.template_hint: Pre-built meal plans from experienced hikers
meals.apply_template_confirm: This will replace all current entries. Continue?

dashboard.title: My Hikes
dashboard.select_hint: Select a list and meal plan to calculate

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm ProHikes AI — an outdoor and survival specialist. I'll help you prepare for your hike, check your gear, and advise on routes and safety.
chat.limit_reached: Daily message limit reached (15/day). Support the project for more access!

landing.subtitle: Gear, meals and AI assistant — all in one app
landing.feature_gear_desc: Manage your gear, track every item's weight
landing.feature_meals_desc: 75 products, macros, templates for comfort and ultralight
landing.feature_lists_desc: Pack, check off, control your backpack weight
landing.feature_ai_desc: Gear analysis, recommendations, data import via chat

privacy.data_collect_intro: ProHikes collects only the minimum data necessary to provide the service:
privacy.data_name: Name — obtained from Google when signing in with Google
privacy.data_gear: Gear data — items, weights, categories that you create
privacy.data_meals: Meal plan data — meal plans, dishes, products
privacy.data_lists: Packing lists — gear lists for specific trips
privacy.purpose_text: All data is used exclusively to provide you with ProHikes functionality — gear management, meal planning, creating packing lists.
privacy.third_intro: To operate the service, we use the following third-party services:
privacy.third_supabase: Supabase — data storage (database, authentication). Servers located in the EU.
privacy.third_deepseek: DeepSeek — AI assistant. Your chat messages are sent to the DeepSeek API for processing to generate responses and recommendations.
privacy.cookies_text: ProHikes uses one cookie — NEXT_LOCALE — to save your language preference. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.deletion_text: You can request deletion of all your data by creating a request on
privacy.deletion_period: Data will be deleted within 30 days of receiving the request.
privacy.no_sale_text: ProHikes does not sell your personal data to third parties. We do not use your data for advertising or marketing.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the service.
